Down Payment Calculator

Calculate your home down payment amount and see how different percentages affect your mortgage. Plan your savings for homeownership.

FAQ

How much down payment do I need?

Conventional loans typically require 5-20%. FHA loans require 3.5%. Putting 20% down avoids PMI (Private Mortgage Insurance).

What is PMI?

Private Mortgage Insurance is required when your down payment is less than 20%. It typically costs 0.5-1% of the loan amount annually.

Is a bigger down payment always better?

A larger down payment means lower monthly payments and no PMI, but keeping an emergency fund is also important. Balance both goals.
